title: Melted Smoky Russian Onion Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring smoky onions and a tangy, creamy sauce, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the onion pieces onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the smoked paprika, sour cream, mayonnaise, chopped fresh dill, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the onion pieces on the skewers.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the onions are tender and lightly caramelized.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving to kids.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
